title: Short Spears
description: Short Spears Helpfull For Visuality And Pvp!
body:
# Short Spears

This texture pack shortens the default spear model to give it a cleaner and more compact look. Perfect for players who prefer a less bulky weapon design, making gameplay feel smoother and less obstructed on screen.

Whether you're exploring, fighting, or just enjoying the game, this small tweak improves visibility and gives your spear a fresh, modern style.

✨ Features:

- Shorter and cleaner spear design
- Better screen visibility
- Simple and lightweight pack
- Works smoothly with your game
